questions.question: What is the time complexity of Heapify operation in a heap data structure?
questions.explanation: Time complexity of Heapify operation in a heap data structure is O(log n).

questions.question: Which one of the following operations is not possible in a binary search tree?
questions.explanation: Traverse operation is not possible in a binary search tree. It is possible in a heap data structure.

questions.question: What is the purpose of Heapify operation in Heapsort algorithm?
options: To build a heap from an array
questions.explanation: The purpose of Heapify operation in Heapsort algorithm is to build a heap from an array.

questions.question: Which data structure is used to implement Heapsort algorithm?
questions.explanation: Heapsort algorithm uses a heap data structure.

questions.question: What is the advantage of using Heapsort algorithm over other sorting algorithms?
options: It has a worst-case time complexity of O(n^2)
It has a constant space complexity
It has a worst-case time complexity of O(n log n) and a space complexity of O(1)
questions.explanation: Heapsort algorithm has a worst-case time complexity of O(n log n) and a space complexity of O(1).
